positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration featuring a friendly, stylized fox wearing a tiny adventurer's backpack, standing on a whimsical hill under a deep gradient sunset sky. The scene should utilize bold lines, limited palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, forest green, and creamy yellow, reminiscent of vintage storybook art. Use clean silhouettes and strong outlines. The fox should be facing slightly off-center to the left, looking curious. Composition must be centered and vertically balanced. Art style: Mid-century modern illustration meets storybook whimsy, high contrast, solid color blocking, suitable for screen printing on fabric.
